case_title: *** TRANSFERRED TO BUTTE COUNTY **** PEARL SCOTT VS. PG&E ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF KIA JAFARI IN SUPPORT OF STIPULATED MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE (TRANSACTION ID # 100007384) FILED BY DEFENDANT ENLOE MEDICAL CENTER

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT ENLOE MEDICAL CENTER'S MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND PLAINTIFF PEARL SCOTT STIPULATED TO THE GRANTING OF THE MOTION. THE CASE WILL BE TRANSFERRED TO BUTTE COUNTY. ALL COSTS OF TRANSFER WILL BE PAID BY ENLOE MEDICAL CENTER. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976 =302/HK

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-11-2017 Continued To Mar-08-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE
Off Calendar Jan-05-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendant Enloe Medical Center's motion for change of venue is granted. No opposition filed and plaintiff Pearl Scott stipulated to the granting of the motion. The case will be transferred to Butte County. All costs of transfer will be paid by Enloe Medical Center. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/hk
